The term leaflet refers to a small sheet of paper containing information, used for dissemination of said information, often an advertisement. 術語「傳單」是指包含訊息的小張紙，用於傳播所述訊息，通常是廣告。

meaning: 富裕、中產階級或上層階級。
sentences: They live in a beautiful house in a leafy suburb. 他們住在綠樹成蔭的郊區一棟漂亮的房子裡。
Something described as leafy is wealthy, middle- or upper-class. 被描述為綠葉的東西是富有的、中產階級或上層階級的。
The local football team won the league championship for the first time. 當地足球隊首次贏得了聯賽（聯盟）冠軍。
When it comes to technology, this company is in a different league. 談到科技，這家公司處於完全不同的水平（檔次）。
The plumber is here to fix the leaking water pipe in the kitchen. 水電工來修理廚房漏水的噴水管了。
The secret information was leaked to the media by an unknown source. 秘密資訊由不明來源洩露給了媒體。
The report highlights the danger of radiation leakage from the power plant. 報告強調了電廠發生輻射洩漏的危險。
We need to find a way to prevent any further leakage of information. 我們需要找到一種方法來防止資訊的進一步洩漏。
We need to fix the leaky faucet in the bathroom. 我們需要修理浴室裡漏水的水龍頭。
The old boat was very leaky and hard to keep afloat. 這艘舊船漏水嚴重，很難保持漂浮。
The old wooden fence managed to lean to one side after the storm. 舊木籬笆在暴風雨後竟然（傾斜）歪向了一邊。
I like to eat lean meat and vegetables for a healthy family dinner. 我喜歡在健康的家庭晚餐吃瘦（傾斜）肉和蔬菜。
a man of socialist leanings 一個有社會主義傾向的人
The term leaning refers to A tendency or propensity. 術語「傾向」是指傾向或傾向。
The athlete made a spectacular leap and won the gold medal. 那位運動員完成了一次精彩的跳躍並贏得了金牌。
The company decided to take a giant leap into the global market. 公司決定邁出一大步，進入全球市場。
The children enjoyed playing leapfrog in the park. 孩子們喜歡在公園裡玩跳蛙遊戲。
The company managed to leapfrog its competitors with its new technology. 該公司憑藉其新技術成功超越了競爭對手。
I'm learning how to speak Spanish this semester. 我這學期正在學習如何說西班牙語。
It's never too late to learn a new skill. 學習新技能永遠不會太晚。
He is a very learned professor who has written several great books. 他是一位學識淵博（學到了）的教授，寫過幾本偉大的著作。
She gave a very learned description of the historical event today. 她對今天的歷史事件做了一個非常博學（學到了）的描述。

meaning: 一個正在學習的人；1 條接收指令。
sentences: She’s still a learner, so she’s prone to making mistakes. 她仍然是一個學習者，所以很容易犯錯。
Cambridge University Press has released a new series aimed at young learners with epilepsy. 劍橋大學出版社發布了針對患有癲癇症的年輕學習者的新系列。
Learning a new language is a great way to broaden your horizons. 學習一門新語言是開闊視野的好方法。
The university provides various resources for lifelong learning. 該大學為終身學習提供多樣化的資源。
I learnt so many things in this school. 我在這所學校學到了很多。
People often learnt when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時學習。
They signed a three-year lease for the small office in the city center. 他們為市中心的小辦公室簽署了一份為期三年的租約。
The company decided to lease a large warehouse to store its products. 公司決定租用一個大倉庫來存放產品。
The term leash refers to a brace and a half; a tierce. 術語“皮帶”指的是一個半支架；三層。
The lesson introduced leash as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了皮帶作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
You should drink at least eight glasses of water every day. 你每天應該喝至少八杯水。
That's the least I can do to help you. 那是我能幫你的最基本的事情。
He bought a new pair of high-quality brown leather shoes. 他買了一雙高品質的棕色皮鞋。
The steering wheel of the new car is covered in soft black leather. 新車的方向盤覆蓋著柔軟的黑色皮革。
What time does the train leave the station? 火車幾點離開車站？
Please don't forget to lock the door when you leave. 離開時請別忘了鎖門。
The history professor gave a fascinating lecture on ancient Egypt. 歷史系教授做了一場關於古代埃及的精彩講座（演講）。
I need to attend a professional lecture on computer science tonight. 我今晚需要參加一場關於計算機科學的專業講座。
The guest lecturer gave an inspiring speech to all the students. 客座講師對所有的學生發表了一場激勵人心的演講。
He works as a senior lecturer at a leading international university. 他在一家領先的國際大學擔任高級講師。

meaning: 礦脈；含有有價值礦物的有限岩石。
sentences: The term ledge refers to a lode; a limited mass of rock bearing valuable mineral. 術語「壁架」指的是礦脈；含有有價值礦物的有限岩石。
The lesson introduced ledge as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「壁架」作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The accountant recorded the transactions in the general ledger. 會計師將交易記錄在總帳中。
Please check the entries in the sales ledger. 請核對銷售帳簿中的記錄。

meaning: 耗盡（資源）而不給予回報。
sentences: Bert leeched hundreds of files from the BBS, but never uploaded anything in return. 伯特從 BBS 竊取了數百個文件，但從未上傳任何內容作為回報。
To leech means to drain (resources) without giving back. 水蛭意味著耗盡（資源）而不給予回報。
She made a delicious soup with leeks and potatoes. 她做了一道用韭蔥和馬鈴薯熬製的美味湯品。
Leeks are a common ingredient in many traditional European dishes. 韭蔥是許多傳統歐洲料理中常見的食材。

meaning: 不同程度或數量的自由或彈性。
sentences: I don't think we have a lot of leeway when it comes to proper formatting. 我認為在正確的格式方面我們沒有太多的餘地。
The term leeway refers to A varying degree or amount of freedom or flexibility. 迴旋餘地一詞是指不同程度或數量的自由或彈性。
Turn left at the next intersection to reach the hospital. 在下一個路口左轉即可到達醫院。
He wrote the message with his left hand. 他用左手寫下了這則訊息。

meaning: 持有社會主義或共產主義傾向的經濟觀點，通常與進步的社會觀點同時存在的人；反資本主義者。
sentences: The term leftist refers to someone who holds socialist or communist-leaning economic views, usually alongside progressive social views; an anticapitalist. 「左派」一詞指的是持有社會主義或共產主義傾向的經濟觀點，通常與進步的社會觀點同時存在的人；一個反資本主義者。
The lesson introduced leftist as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了左派作為一個有用的術語來理解。

meaning: 剩餘；被拋在後面；額外的;奇怪的;儲備中。
sentences: Do you want some of the leftover supplies from the event? 您想要一些活動剩餘的物資嗎？
I have some leftover spaghetti in the fridge, so I don't plan to cook tonight. 我冰箱裡還有一些剩下的義大利麵，所以今晚我不打算做飯。
He broke his leg while skiing last winter. 他去年冬天滑雪時折斷了腿。
She has long and slender legs. 她擁有一雙修長纖細的腿。
He left a lasting legacy of peace and cooperation through his work. 他留下了和平與合作的持久遺產（遺留物）。
The old building is a beautiful legacy of the city's colonial history. 這棟舊建築是這座城市殖民歷史的美麗遺產。
He consulted a lawyer to seek professional legal advice. 他諮詢了律師以尋求專業的法律建議。
The company is facing several serious legal problems lately. 公司最近正面臨幾項嚴重的法律問題。

meaning: 骰子遊戲；和碰運氣一樣。
sentences: The term legality refers to a dice game; the same as chuck-a-luck. 合法性一詞指的是骰子遊戲；和碰運氣一樣。
The lesson introduced legality as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了合法性作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 使某事合法化的過程、合法化、非刑事化的過程。
sentences: The hippies marched for the legalization of marijuana. 嬉皮士為大麻合法化而遊行。
The term legalization refers to the process of making something legal, the process to legalize, decriminalization. 合法化一詞是指使某事合法化的過程，即合法化、非刑事化的過程。

meaning: 使法律合法化或獲得法律許可。要么將非法的事情非刑罪化，要么明確允許它發生。
sentences: There is a debate whether or not to legalize some of the softer drugs. 對於是否使一些較軟的藥物合法化存在爭議。
To legalize means to make legal or permit under law. Either by decriminalising something that has been illegal or by specifically permitting it. 合法化意味著使法律合法化或獲得法律許可。要么將非法行為合法化，要么明確允許這樣做。

meaning: 在法律允許的情況下；不違反法律。
sentences: You can legally park in the lot on weekends without paying the fee, they won't ticket you. 週末你可以合法地在停車場停車，無需支付費用，他們不會給你開罰單。
If someone acts legally, they do so in a way that is as permitted by law; not contrary to law. 如果某人的行為合法，他們的行為方式是法律允許的；不違反法律。
The ancient legend says that the tomb is protected by a deadly curse. 古代傳說（傳奇）說這座陵墓受到一個致命詛咒的保護。
He achieved international fame and became a world movie legend now. 他獲得了國際名聲，現在成了一個世界影壇傳奇。
Robin Hood is a legendary hero who stole from the rich and gave to the poor. 羅賓漢是一位劫富濟貧的傳奇（傳說中的）英雄。
The legendary musician's final concert was attended by thousands of fans. 這位傳奇音樂家的最後一場演唱會有數千名歌迷參加。

meaning: 具有特定類型或數量的腿。
sentences: Many of the big African spiders are hairy- legged. 許多大型非洲蜘蛛都是毛腿的。
Giraffes are the longest- legged animals. 長頸鹿是腿最長的動物。

meaning: 夠清晰易讀；可讀，尤其是手寫體。
sentences: Despite hardly having any energy to lift a pen, she left a legible note on the paper. 儘管幾乎沒有力氣提筆，她還是在紙上留下了清晰的字條。
The report describes the result as legible. 該報告將結果描述為清晰可見。

meaning: 很多的;廣闊的;數量非常多。
sentences: Russia’s labor and capital resources are woefully inadequate to overcome the state’s needs and vulnerabilities, which are legion. 俄羅斯的勞動力和資本資源嚴重不足以克服國家的巨大需求和脆弱性。
dissatisfied customers and their legion complaints 不滿意的客戶及其大量投訴

meaning: 通過法律（包括修改或廢除現有法律）。
sentences: If they can't get people to do the right thing by talking then they will try to legislate and enforce the statutes. 如果他們不能透過談話讓人們做正確的事，那麼他們將嘗試立法和執行法規。
Candidates always promise to legislate change. 候選人總是承諾立法改革。
The government introduced new legislation to control the use of plastic. 政府引入了新法規（立法）來管制塑料的使用。
Effective legislation is essential for protecting the rights of all citizens. 有效的立法對於保護所有公民的權利至關重要。
The country's legislative branch is responsible for making and passing laws. 該國的立法部門負責制定和通過法律。
The committee proposed several legislative changes to improve the tax system. 委員會提出了幾項立法變更以改善稅收制度。
Legislators are currently debating the new bill on environmental protection. 立法者（議員）目前正在辯論關於環保的新法案。
The new law was passed by a majority of legislators in the parliament. 新法案獲得了議會大多數立法者的通過。

meaning: 有權制定、修改和廢除法律的政府機構。
sentences: state legislature 州立法機關
bicameral legislature 兩院制立法機關

meaning: 合法的;合法的;規則允許的；有效的。
sentences: Did you see how fast that person was moving? I don't think they're legit. 你看到那個人移動的速度有多快了嗎？我不認為他們是合法的。
Something described as legit is legitimate; legal; allowed by the rules; valid. 被描述為合法的東西就是合法的；合法的;規則允許的；有效的。

meaning: 公眾對某個機構（例如政府、公司或系統）的接受度。
sentences: After decades of inequality and oppression, the regime had lost legitimacy with its own population. 經過幾十年的不平等和壓迫，政權已經失去了人民的合法性。
The fall of the Soviet Union in 1991 was seen by many as proof of capitalism’s legitimacy over communism. 許多人認為 1991 年蘇聯的解體證明了資本主義相對於共產主義的合法性。
The company provided a legitimate explanation for the delay in the project. 公司為專案延誤提供了一個正當（合理的）解釋。
They are the legitimate heirs to their grandfather's vast family estate. 他們是祖父巨額家產的合法繼承人。
If someone acts legitimately, they do so in a way that is in a legitimate manner, properly, fair and square. 如果某人的行為合法，那麼他們的行為方式就是合法、正當、公平、公正。
The speaker responded legitimately during the discussion. 發言者在討論中做出了合理的回應。
Reading books in the park is my favorite leisure activity. 在公園讀書是我最喜歡的休閒活動。
Technology has provided us with more leisure time for ourselves. 科技為我們提供了更多的個人空閒時間。
We took a leisurely walk along the beautiful beach at sunset now. 我們現在在日落時分沿著美麗的海灘悠閒地（悠閒）散步。
They spent a leisurely afternoon drinking tea and talking in garden. 他們花了一個悠閒的下午在花園喝茶聊天。
I like to put a slice of fresh lemon in my tea. 我喜歡在茶裡放一片新鮮檸檬。
The lemon juice added a refreshing taste to the salad. 檸檬汁為這份沙拉增添了清爽的味道。
Would you like a glass of cold and refreshing lemonade? 妳想喝杯冰涼清爽的檸檬水嗎？
She made a batch of homemade lemonade for the garden party. 她為遊園會做了一批手作檸檬水。
Could you please lend me your umbrella? It's starting to rain. 你能把傘借給我嗎？開始下雨了。
The library allows students to lend up to five books at a time. 圖書館允許學生一次最多借五本書。

meaning: 借錢的人，尤其是藉錢的人；具體來說，專門提供貸款的銀行或其他實體。
sentences: The term lender refers to one who lends, especially money; specifically, a bank or other entity that specializes in granting loans. 貸方一詞指的是藉錢的人，尤其是金錢；具體來說，是專門提供貸款的銀行或其他實體。
The lesson introduced lender as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了貸方作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
What is the total length of the new bridge across the river? 這座橫跨河流的新橋總長度是多少？
The movie has a length of over three hours, which is quite long. 這部電影長達三個多小時，挺長的。
We need to lengthen the curtains to cover the large window today. 我們今天需要加長窗簾以遮住那扇大窗戶。
The manager decided to lengthen the meeting to discuss more details. 經理決定延長（加長）會議以討論更多細節。
The project was delayed due to a lengthy negotiation process with the rivals. 由於與對手之間冗長的談判過程，專案被推遲了。
He provided a lengthy explanation for his absence from the meeting. 他為自己的缺席提供了一個冗長的解釋。

meaning: 憐憫或寬恕的品質，尤其是在法庭案件中分配懲罰時。
sentences: The convicted felon asked for leniency, but because the crime was so heinous the judge refused and gave the maximum sentence. 被定罪的重罪犯請求寬大處理，但由於罪行極其惡劣，法官拒絕了，並判處了最高刑罰。
The term leniency refers to The quality of mercy or forgiveness, especially in the assignment of punishment as in a court case. 寬大一詞是指憐憫或寬恕的品質，特別是在法庭案件中分配懲罰時。

meaning: 鬆懈；不嚴格；容忍異議或偏差。
sentences: The standard is fairly lenient, so use your discretion. 標準相當寬鬆，因此請酌情考慮。
The report describes the result as lenient. 報告稱這一結果是寬大的。
I need to clean the camera lens before taking any photos. 在拍照前我需要清理相機鏡頭。
She bought a pair of high-quality contact lenses for her eyes. 她買了一副高品質的隱形眼鏡。

meaning: 四旬齋的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term lent refers to alternative letter-case form of Lent. 術語「四旬齋」是指四旬齋的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced lent as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了借出作為一個有用的術語來理解。
She made a healthy and nutritious soup with red lentils. 她做了一道用紅扁豆熬製的健康營養湯品。
Lentils are a great source of protein for vegetarians. 扁豆是素食者優質的蛋白質來源。
The leopard is a powerful and agile predator known for its spots. 豹是一種強大敏捷、以其斑點聞名的捕食者。
We saw a family of leopards resting under a tree in the savannah. 我們在熱帶草原的一棵樹下看到一群豹正在休息。
Leprosy is a chronic infectious disease that can now be treated with medicine. 麻風病是一種慢性傳染病，現在可以用藥物治療。
The hospital provides specialized care for patients with leprosy. 這家醫院為麻風病患者提供專門照護。
The organization works to promote the rights of lesbian and gay individuals. 該組織致力於推動女同性戀者和男同性戀者的權利。
Many people attended the parade to celebrate the pride of the lesbian community. 許多人參加了遊行，慶祝女同性戀社群的驕傲。

meaning: 受感染或以其他方式受傷或生病的器官或部分，特別是在一塊皮膚上。
sentences: The term lesion refers to an infected or otherwise injured or diseased organ or part, especially such on a patch of skin. 術語「病變」是指受感染或以其他方式受傷或生病的器官或部分，尤其是在一塊皮膚上。
The lesson introduced lesion as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了病變作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
You should spend less time on social media and more on studying. 你應該減少在社交媒體上的時間，多花點時間讀書。
The new model is more efficient and consumes less energy. 新型號效率更高，且消耗更少能源。
The doctor prescribed some medicine to help lessen the patient's pain. 醫生開了一些藥物來幫助減輕（減少）病人的疼痛。
The new policy aims to lessen the environmental impact of industrial work. 新政策旨在減輕工業活動對環境的影響。

meaning: 兩個（或很少超過兩個）事物：尺寸較小（較小）、價值、重要性等。
sentences: lesser panda 小熊貓
lesser yellowlegs 小黃腿
I have a piano lesson every Thursday afternoon. 我每週四下午有一堂鋼琴課。
The accident taught him a valuable lesson about safety. 那次事故教給了他一個關於安全的寶貴教訓。
We should leave early, lest we miss the last train home tonight. 我們應該早點出發，以免（唯恐）錯過今晚最後一班回家的火車。
He spoke in a quiet voice, lest he wake the sleeping baby in the room. 他輕聲說話，以免吵醒房間裡熟睡的寶寶。
Please let me know if you need any further assistance. 如果你需要進一步的協助，請告訴我。
My parents won't let me go to the party tonight. 我父母今晚不讓我去參加聚會。
The snake's venom is extremely lethal and can kill a human in minutes. 這種蛇的毒液極其致命。
The new weapon is considered to be a lethal threat to national security. 這種新武器被認為是對國家安全的致命威脅。
I received a beautiful handwritten letter from my grandmother. 我收到祖母寄來的一封漂亮的親筆信。
There are twenty-six letters in the English alphabet. 英語字母表中有 26 個字母。

meaning: 書面文本，尤其是列印出來的文本。
sentences: The lettering on the sign made it clear that intruders were unwelcome. 標誌上的文字清楚地表明入侵者是不受歡迎的。
The term lettering refers to Written text, especially when printed. 術語「刻字」是指書面文本，尤其是印刷時的文本。
I'd like a fresh green salad with extra lettuce and tomatoes. 我想要一份加了額外萵苣與番茄的新鮮綠色沙拉。
She added some crisp lettuce leaves to the chicken sandwich. 她在雞肉三明治中加入了一些脆嫩的萵苣葉。
The child is undergoing treatment for leukemia. 這孩子正在接受白血病治療。
Scientists are conducting research to find a cure for leukemia. 科學家正在進行研究以尋找白血病的治癒方法。

meaning: 起身或從休息中起身；說的是牛。
sentences: Something described as levant is rising or having risen from rest; said of cattle. 被描述為黎凡特的事物正在上升或從靜止中上升；說的是牛。
The word levant is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. Levant這個字常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。
The students are divided into different groups based on their language level. 學生根據他們的語言程度被分成不同的組別。
The water level in the reservoir has dropped significantly. 水庫的水位已顯著下降。
With great effort and a big crowbar I managed to lever the beam off the floor. 經過巨大的努力和一根大撬棍，我成功地將橫樑從地板上撬開。
To lever means to move with a lever. To lever 的意思是用槓桿來移動。

meaning: 使用；剝削；操縱以充分利用（某物）。
sentences: They plan to leverage the publicity into a good distribution agreement. 他們計劃利用宣傳來達成良好的分銷協議。
They plan to leverage off the publicity to get a good distribution agreement. 他們計劃利用宣傳來達成良好的分銷協議。

meaning: 閃電；一道閃電；還有明亮的火焰或光。
sentences: The term levin refers to lightning; a bolt of lightning; also, a bright flame or light. 萊文一詞指的是閃電；一道閃電；此外，明亮的火焰或光。
The lesson introduced levin as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了萊文這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 徵收（稅金或罰款）以收取到期款項或沒收財產。
sentences: to levy a tax 課稅
To levy means to impose (a tax or fine) to collect monies due, or to confiscate property. 徵稅是指徵收（稅金或罰款）以收取到期款項或沒收財產。

meaning: 淫蕩 、 性行為 粗魯 。
sentences: The report describes the result as lewd. 報告稱這一結果是淫蕩的。 報告稱這一結果是淫蕩的。 報告稱這一結果是淫蕩的。
Everyone noticed the lewd tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的猥褻語氣。 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的猥褻語氣。 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的猥褻語氣。

meaning: 特定於某個主題的一組詞彙。
sentences: the baseball lexicon 棒球字典
a baseball lexicon 棒球字典
The company is required by law to have public liability insurance. 法律要求公司必須投保公共責任險。
He was considered a liability to the team because of his lack of focus. 由於缺乏專注力，他被認為是團隊的累贅（負擔）。
The driver was held liable for the damage caused by the accident. 司機對事故造成的損失負有責任。
The small wooden cottage is liable to catch fire if the rules are not followed. 如果不遵守規定，這座小木屋很容易發生火災。

meaning: 在兩個團體或組織之間傳遞訊息的任何人。
sentences: As a community liaison, I work to make sure the general public knows about our organization's work. 作為社區聯絡員，我致力於確保公眾了解我們組織的工作。
The term liaison refers to any person who relays information between two groups or organizations. 聯絡員一詞是指在兩個團體或組織之間傳遞訊息的任何人。
I can't trust him anymore because he managed to be a proven liar. 我再也不能信任他了，因為他竟然被證實是個騙子（說謊者）。
Don't be a liar; it's important to tell the entire truth at home. 別當個騙子；在家裡說出全部真相是很重要的。
The politician sued the newspaper for libel. 這位政治家控告該報紙誹謗。
It is illegal to publish libelous statements about someone. 發表關於某人的誹謗性言論是違法的。
He has very liberal views on various social and political issues. 他對各種社會與政治議題有非常開放的看法。
The university offers a broad liberal arts education for its students. 該大學為學生提供廣泛的通識教育。
The term liberalism refers to the quality of being liberal. 自由主義一詞指的是自由主義的品質。
The lesson introduced liberalism as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了自由主義作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The army set out to liberate the occupied city from the enemy troops. 軍隊出發去解放被敵軍佔領的城市。
The discovery of the new technology will help to liberate us from manual labor. 新技術的發現將有助於將我們從體力勞動中解放出來。
The people celebrated their liberation from the military dictatorship. 人民慶祝他們從軍事獨裁統治中獲得解放。
The organization works for the liberation of political prisoners around the world. 該組織致力於釋放（解放）世界各地的政治犯。

meaning: 崇尚自由；而且，有相對自由的傾向。
sentences: He has libertarian views. 他有自由主義觀點。
Something described as libertarian is advocating liberty; also, having a relative tendency towards liberty. 所謂自由主義者就是提倡自由。而且，具有相對自由的傾向。
Freedom of speech is a fundamental part of individual liberty. 言論自由是個人自由的一個基本組成部分。
The Statue of Liberty is a world-famous symbol of freedom. 自由女神像是舉世聞名的自由象徵。

meaning: 與性本能相關或基於性本能的驅動力或精神能量，但本身不一定是性的。
sentences: For Freudians, libido means the desire to "unite and bind" with objects in the world. 對佛洛伊德主義者來說，力比多意味著與世界上的物體「結合和結合」的慾望。
The ego as an organ which seeks to synthesize thoughts in the psyche is said to be driven by libido or eros. 自我作為一個尋求在心靈中綜合思想的器官，據說是由力比多或愛欲驅動的。
The helpful librarian showed me where to find the historical books. 熱心的圖書管理員指給我看在哪裡可以找到歷史書籍。
She works as a professional librarian at the local public library. 她在當地的公共圖書館擔任專業圖書管理員。
I often go to the university library to study in silence. 我經常去大學圖書館安靜地讀書。
The local library has a vast collection of books and magazines. 當地圖書館收藏了大量的書籍和雜誌。
You must have a valid driver's license to drive a car legally now. 妳現在必須擁有有效的駕駛執照才能合法開車。
The company was granted a formal license to export its products today. 公司今天被授予了出口其產品的正式許可（執照）。

meaning: 已獲得許可證（由所需當局頒發）。
sentences: Only licensed exterminators can purchase rat poison in this state. 在該州，只有獲得許可的滅鼠人員才能購買老鼠藥。
The opening hours of licensed premises are restricted to prevent all-night drinking. 持牌場所的開放時間受到限制，以防止通宵飲酒。
The little boy enjoyed licking his strawberry ice cream cone. 小男孩很享受地舔著他的草莓冰淇淋甜筒。
The dog happily licked its owner's hand when he arrived home. 當主人回到家時，狗開心地舔著他的手。
Our football team took a licking last night. 昨晚我們的足球隊表現不佳。
The term licking refers to A great loss or defeat. 舔這個字指的是巨大的損失或失敗。
Please put the lid back on the pot to keep the food warm. 請把蓋子蓋回鍋上以保持食物溫暖。
He opened the lid of the small wooden box and found a key. 他開啟小木盒的蓋子，發現了一把鑰匙。
It's wrong to lie to your parents about your grades. 為了成績對父母撒謊是不對的。
He decided to lie down on the sofa for a short nap. 他決定躺在沙發上小睡一會兒。

meaning: 在債務或義務解除之前佔有債務人財產作為擔保的權利。
sentences: The term lien refers to a right to take possession of a debtor’s property as security until a debt or duty is discharged. 留置权一词是指在债务或义务得到解除之前占有债务人财产作为担保的权利。
The lesson introduced lien as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹留置權是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The young lieutenant led his platoon through the difficult mountain terrain. 那位年輕的中尉帶領他的小隊穿過艱難的山區地形。
He was promoted to the rank of lieutenant after years of excellent service. 在多年優秀服務後，他被晉升為中尉。
Traveling to different countries has enriched my life. 去不同的國家旅行豐富了我的生活。
Life is full of surprises, both good and bad. 生活充滿了驚喜，無論好壞。

meaning: 去營救；帶到安全的地方。
sentences: To lifeboat means to rescue; to carry to safety. 救生艇意味著救援；攜帶至安全處。
People may lifeboat in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下使用救生艇。
The lifeguard rescued the little child from the deep swimming pool. 救生員從深水池中救出了那個小孩。
Please listen to the lifeguard's instructions to ensure your safety. 請聽從救生員的指示，以確保您的安全。

meaning: 像生命一樣，像生命一樣，準確地再現
sentences: The robot was so lifelike, Jack could hardly tell it apart from his sister. 這個機器人是如此栩栩如生，傑克幾乎無法將它與他的妹妹區分開來。
The report describes the result as lifelike. 報告稱這項結果栩栩如生。

meaning: 溺水或墜落的受害者可能會抓住的繩子。
sentences: The term lifeline refers to a line to which a drowning or falling victim may cling. 生命線一詞是指溺水或墜落的受害者可以抓住的線。
The lesson introduced lifeline as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了生命線作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She has a lifelong passion for classical music and started playing at three. 她對古典音樂有著終身的熱愛，三歲就開始彈奏了。
The two colleagues shared a lifelong friendship after working together for years. 兩位同事在共同工作多年後，建立了終身的友誼。

meaning: 拯救生命的人或事。救生員或其他救援人員。
sentences: My dad loves his job as a surf lifesaver. 我爸爸熱愛衝浪救生員的工作。
Paramedics are not just ordinary workers but lifesavers with a very important job. 護理人員不僅是普通工作人員，也是擔負著非常重要工作的救生員。

meaning: 拯救生命，尤其是溺水者的行為。
sentences: I’m normally a big fan of lifesaving, but in his case we can make an exception. 我通常非常熱衷於救生，但就他而言，我們可以破例。
The term lifesaving refers to The act of saving a life, especially from drowning. 救生一詞是指拯救生命，尤其是溺水者的行為。
Traveling around the world is a dream of a whole lifetime. 環遊世界是一生的夢想。
He dedicated his entire lifetime to scientific research and study. 他將一生都奉獻給了科學研究與學習。
Could you please help me lift this heavy suitcase onto the rack? 你能幫我把這個沉重的行李箱抬到架子上嗎？
The hotel elevator is broken, so we have to use the stairs. 飯店電梯壞了，所以我們必須走樓梯。
He tore a ligament in his ankle during the football match. 他在足球比賽中弄斷了腳踝的韌帶。
Ligaments are strong bands of tissue that connect bones together. 韌帶是連結骨骼的強韌組織帶。

meaning: 被束縛或僵硬的狀態；剛性。
sentences: the ligature of a joint 關節結紮
The term ligature refers to The state of being bound or stiffened; stiffness. 結紮一詞是指被束縛或變硬的狀態；剛性。
Please turn off the lights when you leave the room. 離開房間時請隨手關燈。
The morning light shone through the window and woke me up. 早晨的光線穿過窗戶把我喚醒。
The news helped to lighten the mood in the office after a difficult week. 這個消息有助於減輕一週辛苦工作後辦公室裡的沈重氣氛。
The sky began to lighten as the sun rose above the beautiful mountains. 隨著太陽升到優美的群山之上，天空開始變亮。
a lighter of lamps 打火機
The term lighter refers to a person who lights things. 打火機這個字指的是點燃東西的人。

meaning: 快樂、高興、享受活著的快樂；不沮喪或悲傷。
sentences: The lighthearted young lovers ran over the hills. 一對無憂無慮的年輕戀人跑過山丘。
The report describes the result as lighthearted. 報告稱這項結果令人輕鬆。
The old stone lighthouse stands on the edge of the rocky cliff. 那座古老的石造燈塔矗立在岩石峭壁的邊緣。
The lighthouse guides ships safely through the dark and stormy sea. 燈塔引導船隻安全穿過黑暗暴風雨的大海。
The room has very bright and modern lighting. 房間有著非常明亮且現代化的照明。
They are installing new outdoor lighting in the garden. 他們正在花園裡安裝新的戶外照明。
As a teacher, I don't take rudeness in class lightly. 身為老師，我不會對課堂上的粗魯行為掉以輕心。
If someone acts lightly, they do so in a way that is in a light manner. 如果某人的行為很輕鬆，那麼他們就會以一種輕鬆的方式做事。
A sudden flash of lightning lit up the dark night sky. 突然的一道閃電點亮了黑夜的天空。
The ancient tree was struck by lightning during the storm. 那棵古樹在暴風雨中被雷電擊中了。

meaning: 無法控制飲酒的人；喝很少的酒就會醉的人。
sentences: The term lightweight refers to a person who cannot handle their drink; one who gets drunk on very little alcohol. 「輕量級」一詞是指無法處理飲料的人；喝很少的酒就會醉的人。
The lesson introduced lightweight as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了輕量級作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 具有容易被喜歡的品質； 友好 ， 風度翩翩 。
sentences: She's a naturally likable person, with lots of friends. 她天生 討人喜歡 ，有很多朋友。 她是個天生討人喜歡的人，有很多朋友。 她天生喜歡討人喜歡，有很多朋友。
The report describes the result as likable. 報告稱這一結果令人滿意。 報告稱這一結果令人滿意。 報告稱這一結果令人滿意。
I really like the taste of fresh strawberries. 我非常喜歡新鮮草莓的味道。
She looks just like her mother when she was young. 她看起來和她母親年輕時一模一樣。
There is a high likelihood of rain this afternoon, so don't forget your umbrella. 今天下午降雨的可能性很大，別忘了帶傘。
The likelihood of a successful outcome is much greater if we work together. 如果我們共同努力，取得成功結果的可能性會大得多。
It is likely to rain this afternoon, so take an umbrella. 今天下午很可能會下雨，所以帶把傘。
The study shows that successful people are likely to work hard. 研究顯示，成功人士很可能是因為努力工作。
She decided to quit her job, and her husband likewise decided to resign. 她決定辭職，她的丈夫也同樣地決定辭職。

We learned the meaning of liking during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了喜歡的意思。
The term lilac refers to a flower of the lilac shrub. 術語“丁香”是指丁香灌木的花。
The lesson introduced lilac as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了紫丁香作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The garden was full of beautiful white lilies blooming in spring. 春天時花園裡開滿了盛開的美麗白百合。
She received a bouquet of fresh lilies as a birthday gift. 她收到了一束新鮮的百合花作為生日禮物。
The athlete suffered a serious injury to his left limb during the race. 那位運動員在比賽中左肢受了重傷。
The monkey was swinging effortlessly from limb to limb in the tree. 猴子在樹上毫不費力地從一根樹枝盪到另一根。

meaning: 主要以 in 開頭：由於疏忽或遺忘而導致僵局、延遲或其他一些未解決狀態的任何中間位置、條件或狀態。
sentences: My passport application has been stuck in bureaucratic limbo for two weeks. 我的護照申請已在官僚機構中陷入僵局兩週了。

The term limbo refers to chiefly preceded by in: any in-between place, or condition or state, of neglect or oblivion which results in deadlock, delay, or some other unresolved status. 「limbo」一詞主要指的是：任何因疏忽或遺忘而導致僵局、延誤或其他未解決狀態的中間位置、條件或狀態。
She added a slice of lime to her tea. 她在茶裡加了一片青檸。

meaning: 關注、注意、主角或核心角色、現在的名氣；聚光燈。

meaning: 富含海洋和淡水沉積物的岩石；主要成分為方解石 (CaCO3)；並以多種形式存在，包括晶體和非晶體。
sentences: a limestone viaduct 石灰岩高架橋

The term limestone refers to an abundant rock of marine and freshwater sediments; primarily composed of calcite (CaCO3); and occurring in a variety of forms, both crystalline and amorphous. 石灰石一詞是指富含海洋和淡水沉積物的岩石；主要成分為方解石 (CaCO3)；並以多種形式存在，包括晶體和非晶體。
There is a weight limit for each suitcase on the airplane. 飛機上的每個行李箱都有重量限制。
We should set a limit on the amount of money we spend. 我們應該為我們的花費設定一個限制。
Everyone has their own personal limitations and strengths in life. 每個人在生活中都有各自的限制與強項。
The study explores the limitations of current medical technology now. 該研究現在探索了目前醫療科技的局限性（限制）。
There are limited places available. Enrol now or you will miss out. 名額有限。立即報名，否則您將錯過。
I have a limited understanding of quantum physics. 我對量子物理學的了解有限。
The celebrities arrived at the awards ceremony in a long black limousine. 名人們乘坐黑色長型豪華轎車抵達頒獎典禮。
They hired a limousine for their wedding day. 他們為婚禮租了一輛豪華轎車。
He began to limp after injuring his ankle during the football match. 他在足球比賽中傷了腳踝後開始跛行。
The old flowers looked limp and withered after being without water for days. 缺水幾天後，那些舊花看起來無力（鬆沓）且枯萎了。

meaning: 椴樹屬的任何一種落葉喬木，有心形的葉子。
sentences: The term linden refers to any of various deciduous trees of the genus Tilia, having heart-shaped leaves. 椴樹一詞是指椴樹屬的任何一種落葉喬木，具有心形的葉子。
The lesson introduced linden as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Linden 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Please stand in a straight line and wait for your turn. 請排成直線並等待輪到你。
The fisherman cast his line into the deep blue sea. 漁夫將魚線投進了深藍色的大海中。

meaning: 來自共同祖先的血統；後代；後代的下降線或親子關係的上升線。
sentences: The term lineage refers to descent in a line from a common progenitor; progeny; descending line of offspring or ascending line of parentage. 血統一詞是指來自共同祖先的血統。後代；後代的下降線或親子關係的上升線。
The lesson introduced lineage as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了血統作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The graph shows a linear relationship between the two variables. 圖表顯示了兩個變數之間的線性關係。
The design features simple linear patterns. 設計以簡單的線性圖案為特徵。
The effect related linearly to the amount of causative agent added. 此效應與添加的致病劑的量呈線性相關。
The team responded linearly to the change. 團隊對變化做出線性響應。
